# Palace of Roman

> Curated multi-brand luxury fashion retailer offering premium designer clothing, shoes, accessories and jewelry from 500+ houses including Gucci, Prada, Calvin Klein, Armani and Versace. Ships worldwide.

Palace of Roman is an online luxury fashion boutique. Inventory is sourced through BrandsGateway, an authorised reseller network for premium European houses — every piece is 100% authentic, shipped sealed from brand-authorised European warehouses, with full tracking and import duties handled on the customer's behalf.

The store carries women's and men's clothing, footwear, bags, accessories and fine jewelry across runway, ready-to-wear and seasonal-sale segments. Prices are in USD; shipping is global; returns are accepted within 14 days of delivery on full-priced merchandise.

## Pages

- [Home](https://palaceofroman.com/): Seasonal hero edit, new arrivals, featured maisons, editorial.
- [Shop all](https://palaceofroman.com/shop): Full catalogue with filters (brand, category, size, color, price).
- [Women's clothing](https://palaceofroman.com/collections/womens-clothing): Dresses, tailoring and ready-to-wear.
- [Women's shoes](https://palaceofroman.com/collections/womens-shoes): Heels, boots and sandals.
- [Men's clothing](https://palaceofroman.com/collections/mens-clothing): Tailoring and considered staples.
- [Men's shoes](https://palaceofroman.com/collections/mens-shoes): Designer footwear.

- [All collections](https://palaceofroman.com/collections): Browse every curated edit.
- [All designers](https://palaceofroman.com/brands): Index of every maison stocked.

## Editorial

- [Journal](https://palaceofroman.com/journal): Long-form editorial and house notes.
- [May 2026 — Quiet authority](https://palaceofroman.com/editorial/may-2026): Tailoring and footwear edit.
- [Resort 2026](https://palaceofroman.com/editorial/resort-2026): Resort edit.
- [The new evening](https://palaceofroman.com/editorial/the-new-evening): Evening edit.

## Policies & info

- [About](https://palaceofroman.com/about): Who Palace of Roman is and how the boutique operates.
- [Authentication](https://palaceofroman.com/authentication): Sourcing and 100% authenticity guarantee.
- [Shipping & returns](https://palaceofroman.com/shipping-returns): Worldwide DHL/FedEx, 14-day returns.
- [Contact](https://palaceofroman.com/contact): Email concierge for sourcing, sizing and styling.
- [FAQ](https://palaceofroman.com/faq): Common questions on orders, sizing and delivery.

## Optional

- [Privacy](https://palaceofroman.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://palaceofroman.com/terms)
